name: BEU Dues Authorization Form
description: Standard authorization for payroll deduction of BEU dues. Used for new and returning members.

name: BEU Grievance Filing Form
description: Official BEU grievance form for filing contract violation complaints. Requires rep signature.

name: BEU Chapter Meeting Attendance Record
description: Sign-in sheet for BEU Eastbridge chapter meetings. Used for quorum and recordkeeping.

name: BEU Contract Campaign Petition
description: Member petition for the 2026 BEU contract campaign. Includes wage and class size demands.

name: BEU Rally Volunteer Waiver
description: Volunteer participation waiver for BEU rallies and public actions.

name: AP Exam Proctor Agreement
description: Eastbridge High School proctor agreement for AP exam administration. BPS standard form.

name: Field Trip Permission Slip and Liability Waiver
description: Parent/guardian consent and liability waiver for Eastbridge High School field trips.

name: Course Syllabus Parent Acknowledgment
description: Parent/guardian acknowledgment of AP US History course syllabus and expectations.

name: History Club Faculty Advisor Agreement
description: Annual agreement between Eastbridge History Club and faculty advisor. Requires principal signature.

name: AP Score Release Parent Authorization
description: Parent/guardian authorization for AP exam score release to colleges and scholarships.

name: New Teacher Mentoring Agreement
description: Mentoring program agreement between mentor and mentee teachers. Required by BPS HR.

name: BPS Supplemental Pay Agreement
description: BPS supplemental pay agreement for AP course stipends and extracurricular assignments.

name: BPS Teacher Evaluation Acknowledgment
description: Annual teacher evaluation acknowledgment form. Required by BPS HR for all staff.

name: BEU Chapter Annual Financial Report Approval
description: End-of-year financial report approval form for BEU chapter treasurer and building rep.

name: BEU Member Information Update Form
description: Form for BEU members to update contact, school assignment, and payroll info.

name: BEU Contract Side Letter Agreement
description: Side letter template for negotiating supplemental contract terms with BPS administration.

name: BEU Position Statement Sign-off
description: Official BEU position statement on school policy issues. Requires chapter rep and executive director signatures.

name: Labor History Pilot Curriculum MOU
description: Memorandum of Understanding for the Labor History pilot unit between BPS and BEU Eastbridge.

name: Room Use Agreement - Outside Groups
description: Agreement for non-school groups using Eastbridge High facilities. Approved by principal.

name: BEU Building Rep Election Certification
description: Certification form for BEU building rep elections. Submitted to BEU central office.
